info.title: Passform API
info.description: The Passform API for creating Google and Apple wallet passes

post.description: Invite a user to the account, this will send an invite to their email

expiry.description: The expiry date of the invite code

ref.description: Reference information, can be an email or other information

post.description: Accept an invite to the account

name.description: The display name of the account

uid.description: The user id of the member

isAdmin.description: Platform-level admin flag for managing enterprise accounts and other admin functions

expiry.description: The expiry date of the invite code

ref.description: Reference information, can be an email or other information

currentPeriodStart.description: The UTC date at which the billing period starts.

currentPeriodEnd.description: The UTC date at which the billing period ends.

maxTemplates.description: Maximum number of templates allowed. Undefined or -1 means unlimited.

maxActivePasses.description: Maximum number of active passes allowed per billing period. Undefined or -1 means unlimited.

activePasses.description: The number of passes active for the current billing period.

get.description: Get the Google wallet URL that users should follow to add to their wallet.
Get the Apple wallet .pkpass file that users can use to add to their wallet.
Get a bundle of multiple Apple Wallet .pkpass files from different templates as a single .pkpasses file, with limit of 10 passes per bundle.

items.description: Pass in format: templateId:passId

get.description: Generate a single Google Pay save URL for multiple passes and redirect to it, with limit of 10 passes per bundle.

items.description: Pass in format: templateId:passId

post.description: Create a pass for a given template with a random passId. The pass ID will be a Base58 string that is 8 characters

anyOf.description: The UTC date at which the pass expires. If this is not provided the voucher will have no expiry.
The UTC date at which the pass becomes valid. If this is not provided the pass is valid from when it is created.

voided.description: Set this to true once the pass has been used

metadata.description:
Metadata is for your internal use. It is not exposed to users through passes.
 The metadata is limited to 5000 characters when serialized to JSON.

items.description: A field that is displayed in a voucher, that is identified by the key. It can be defined in a template and overwritten in a pass

key.description: The identifier of the field. This is not presented to the user.

label.description: The label to go with the value.

backFields.description: The values can be text, numbers or urls.

items.description: A field that is displayed in a voucher, that is identified by the key. It can be defined in a template and overwritten in a pass

key.description: The identifier of the field. This is not presented to the user.

label.description: The label to go with the value.

pass.description: The current details of a pass instance

id.description: Id is a unique identifier of the pass, it could be a voucher code or membership id

templateId.description: Template id used by this voucher

accountId.description: The account id that created the pass/template

code.description: The code that is used as data in the QR Code. This can be different to the id if you wish to have a url or more data in the QR code.

anyOf.description: The UTC date at which the pass expires. If this is not provided the voucher will have no expiry.
The UTC date at which the pass becomes valid. If this is not provided the pass is valid from when it is created.

voided.description: Set this to true once the pass has been used

key.description: The identifier of the field. This is not presented to the user.

label.description: The label to go with the value.

backFields.description: The values can be text, numbers or urls.

key.description: The identifier of the field. This is not presented to the user.

label.description: The label to go with the value.

get.description: Gets the template for creating passes from the given id

anyOf.title: Template
anyOf.description: A template is the basis of a pass it defines the appearance of a pass and properties that don't change between instances of passes.

foregroundColor.description: (Apple and Web Only) A hex or rgb value providing the foreground color. This is used for font color

backgroundColor.description: A hex or rgb value providing the foreground color

labelColor.description: (Apple Only) A hex or rgb value providing the label color. If unset then the foreground color is used.

icon.description: A url to an image of size X by Y.

logo.description: The icon but with text and doesnt need to be square

banner.description: (Google, Apple Only) A url to an image of size X by Y. Also used in link previews.

background.description: (Web Only) A url to an image that is displayed as the background. If this is not provided then backgroundColor is used.

title.description: The title displayed on the pass.

items.description: A field that is displayed in a voucher, that is identified by the key. It can be defined in a template and overwritten in a pass

key.description: The identifier of the field. This is not presented to the user.

label.description: The label to go with the value.

backFields.description: The values can be text, numbers or urls.

key.description: The identifier of the field. This is not presented to the user.

label.description: The label to go with the value.

id.description: Id is a unique identifier for the template

accountId.description: Account Id is the account the template belongs to

labelColor.description: (Apple Only) A hex or rgb value providing the label color. If unset then the foreground color is used.

background.description: (Web Only) A url to an image that is displayed as the background. If this is not provided then backgroundColor is used.

startDate.description: The UTC date at which the event starts.

post.description: Upload an images used in a template. This is a multipart/form-data request where the files are attached and keyed after their purpose.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: The tempalteId, this template might not exist yet

200.description: A record of the images and their urls. This will only return entries for updated images

schema.description: A record of the images and their urls. This will only return entries for updated images

tags.name: templates
tags.description: Templates represent the appearance of a pass. They include information on things such as icons, images, colours and text. A template is used by a pass to define how the pass should look and behave.

tags.name: passes
tags.description: A pass is an individual instance based on a template. It contains details that are specific to its instance.

tags.name: apple
tags.description: Routes used by apple to update passes and manage devices associated to passes.
